query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(CAST(aiScore AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as min_score, MAX(CAST(aiScore AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as max_score FROM scanned_events GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qjSsefs24zghQG.d5f38dec7f6c --database YZ9v9D6zNEEycYVBBKJ8og --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(CAST(aiScore AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as min_score, MAX(CAST(aiScore AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as max_score FROM scanned_events GROUP BY status ORDER BY cnt DESC;
